query: SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.batchNo, st.id AS task_id, st.stationCode, st.taskStatus, st.resultSummary, st.metadata FROM products p JOIN station_tasks st ON st.productId = p.id WHERE p.batchNo = '00500025279' AND p.archivedAt IS NULL ORDER BY st.id; SELECT id, stationCode, optionType, label, active, sortOrder FROM defect_options WHERE label = '充電孔異常' ORDER BY stationCode, id;
